items.title: Portrait looted by Nazis found in home of Dutch SS leader's descendants
items.dek: The painting is believed to have been plundered by high-ranking Nazi Hermann Goering during World War Two.
items.body: The painting is believed to have been plundered by high-ranking Nazi Hermann Goering during World War Two.

items.title: Police find body believed to be of fugitive Australian shooter
items.dek: A body found in New South Wales is thought to be that of a man wanted over a triple murder.
items.body: A body found in New South Wales is thought to be that of a man wanted over a triple murder.
